title: 🚨🔵 BREAKING: Joško Gvardiol deal, done and confirmed as he signs new contract...

blocks.content: 🚨🔵 BREAKING: Joško Gvardiol deal, done and confirmed as he signs new contract at Manchester City.Agreement until June 2031 and move to Spain off for this summer.Seen as key player by director Viana and new coach Enzo Maresca. https://t.co/RFY5K265Rj — Fabrizio Romano (@FabrizioRomano) Jun 15, 2026
